tech_news.title: ‘Destiny 2’ Players Discover Hugely Overpowered Armor Set Before Closure - Forbes
tech_news.description: Destiny 2 has a new, overpowered armor set it has just introduced, but it is too late for Bungie to patch it before Destiny stops getting updates.

tech_news.description: The Legend of Fireball is a new idle game that is now free on Xbox and has easy achievements that you can complete in around an hour.

tech_news.title: This slim camera has a transparent LCD screen for a viewfinder - The Verge
tech_news.description: ﻿The Godox C100 skips a color preview screen for a multi-function viewfinder that can double as a light meter.

tech_news.title: Nintendo Speaking With The Pokémon Company Over Widespread Card Scalping 'Issue' - IGN
tech_news.description: Nintendo's president has been asked to address the current state of Pokémon card shortages and scalping, which many fans feel is worse than ever, despite 10 billion cards being printed last year.
